Title: Directs the the state board of real property tax services to conduct a study on the feasibility of amending property tax revisions for senior citizens located in special districts
Summary: Directs the state board of real property tax services conduct a study on the feasibility of amending property tax revisions for senior citizens located in special districts and provide a report for such study.
ActClause: AN ACT in relation to directing the state board of real property tax services to conduct a study on the feasibility of property tax revisions regarding special districts for senior citizens who are on a fixed income; and providing for the repeal of such provisions upon expiration thereof
